ruff_note: E501 in m7_ppo_gate.py:269 fixed post-run; ruff check src/ scripts/ verified clean
gate_disposition: DOCUMENTED FINDING (per M7 spec: divergence is a finding, not a kill). PPO underfits PI on thermal_ramp tau=10s with 650k steps. Headline RL win comes from M5 RH-LQR (5.97x); M6 APG architecture verified but noise-floor-limited; M7 PPO infrastructure verified but underfit. Project's RL story stands as: (a) classical baseline (PI), (b) optimal-control baseline (RH-LQR) wins 5.97x on slow drift, (c) two RL approaches attempted with documented limitations. Honest reporting in writeup, not a manufactured win.

recommendations: (a) Longer training: increase thermal_ramp timesteps from 200k to 500k
(b) Different reward shaping: use sliding-window variance over tau=10s instead of per-step -y_demeaned^2
(c) Different observation space: add explicit dT/dt (temperature derivative) to obs
(d) Accept gap as documented M7 baseline: PPO RL infrastructure verified, short-training underfit on 1000s gate
gate_fail_analysis.honest_assessment: PPO with 650k steps and 20s episodes may underfit on the 1000s gate trajectory. The thermal_ramp curriculum provides focused exposure but generalisation to the full 1000s test requires more training or reward shaping that explicitly targets the tau=10s Allan band.
